summary: Added a managed-session canary observation producer that publishes codexConformanceCanary/canaryEvidence metadata from MoonMind-owned session evidence when the canary marker and protocol events are present. Added hermetic runtime tests for success and the verifier-reported missing-evidence and bad-evidence cases.

gap_statuses.requirement: Live canary evidence must be produced by MoonMind runtime instrumentation for a real managed Codex canary run.
gap_statuses.evidence: ManagedSessionSupervisor now detects the Codex conformance marker under the managed workspace, publishes marker and evidence artifacts, derives session IDs, turn ID, protocol events, timestamps, mutation count, process count, marker count, and cleanup facts from session observability events plus marker content, and exposes the compact observation as codexConformanceCanary/canaryEvidence metadata on session artifact publication.

gap_statuses.requirement: Session continuity, no premature cleanup, no duplicate process/artifact, and no GitHub mutation must be verified from real runtime evidence.
gap_statuses.evidence: Focused supervisor tests cover normal success, missing resumable handle, missing poll-after-yield, early cleanup ordering, duplicate process count, duplicate marker artifact count, changed session ID, and nonzero GitHub mutation count.

targeted_checks.notes: 47 focused Python tests passed. Automatic frontend phase passed 64 files / 983 passed / 238 skipped.
21 focused Python supervisor tests passed after final formatting cleanup. Automatic frontend phase passed 64 files / 983 passed / 238 skipped.
